scope_summary: An intentional lab-only httpd stop window is active right now. Stay shallow and classify the first failing boundary for ASMS UI is down using only systemctl state, listener checks, curl to https://localhost/algosec-ui/login and https://localhost/algosec/, and one short httpd journal slice if needed. End with a plain support classification and immediate recovery recommendation. Do not inspect login bootstrap, Keycloak internals, BusinessFlow, FireFlow, Metro internals, broker, database, or broad logs.
